title: vitis luochengensis
intro: Vitis luochengensis, also known as the Luocheng grapevine, is a plant species within the Vitaceae family. It is a type of vine native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits such as cardiovascular protection and immune system enhancement. The herbal preparations of Vitis luochengensis typically involve its leaves, stems, and roots, which can be used to make teas, extracts, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
